mapper.insert: INSERT INTO EXAM_ANSWER (EA_NUM, ER_NUM, QUE_NUM, EA_SELECTED, EA_CORRECT) VALUES (#{eaNum}, #{erNum}, #{queNum}, #{eaSelected}, #{eaCorrect})
mapper.select: SELECT EA_NUM, ER_NUM, QUE_NUM, EA_SELECTED, EA_CORRECT FROM EXAM_ANSWER WHERE ER_NUM = #{erNum}

SELECT A.EA_NUM, A.EA_SELECTED, A.EA_CORRECT, Q.QUE_NUM, Q.QUE_TEXT, Q.QUE_ANSWER, Q.QUE_DESC, Q.QUE_POINT FROM EXAM_ANSWER A JOIN QUESTION Q ON A.QUE_NUM = Q.QUE_NUM WHERE A.ER_NUM = #{erNum} ORDER BY Q.QUE_NUM ASC
SELECT SEQ_EXAM_ANSWER.NEXTVAL AS EA_NUM FROM DUAL
